title: Microsoft OneDrive DriveItem
description: Represents a file, folder, or other item stored in a OneDrive or SharePoint document library. All file system objects in OneDrive and SharePoint are returned as driveItem resources.

id.description: Unique identifier of the item within the drive

name.description: The name of the item (filename and extension)

description.description: Provides a user-visible description of the item

size.description: Size of the item in bytes

webUrl.description: URL that displays the resource in the browser

webDavUrl.description: WebDAV compatible URL for the item

createdDateTime.description: Date and time of item creation in UTC

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the item was last modified in UTC

eTag.description: eTag for the entire item (metadata + content)

cTag.description: eTag for the content of the item

file.description: File metadata, if the item is a file

mimeType.description: The MIME type for the file

sha1Hash.description: SHA1 hash for the contents of the file

sha256Hash.description: SHA256 hash for the contents of the file

quickXorHash.description: A proprietary hash of the file for change detection

processingMetadata.description: Indicates whether the file is still being processed to extract metadata

folder.description: Folder metadata, if the item is a folder

childCount.description: Number of children contained immediately within this container

sortBy.description: The method by which the folder should be sorted

viewType.description: The type of view that should be used

image.description: Image metadata, if the item is an image

video.description: Video metadata, if the item is a video

shared.description: Indicates the item has been shared with others

scope.description: The scope of how the item is shared

deleted.description: Information about the deleted state of the item

state.description: Represents the state of the deleted item

IdentitySet.description: A keyed collection of identity resources

ItemReference.description: Provides information necessary to address a driveItem

driveId.description: Unique identifier of the drive instance

id.description: Unique identifier of the item in the drive

name.description: The name of the item being referenced

path.description: Path to navigate to the item

shareId.description: A unique identifier for a shared resource

siteId.description: For SharePoint, the identifier of the site
